title: Diasperus cyrtophyllodes
taxonomy: Diasperus cyrtophyllodes is a species within the family of flowering plants known as the Rutaceae, which includes citrus and rue species. The genus Diasperus is relatively small, containing a limited number of species. Further classification of Diasperus cyrtophyllodes involves its placement within the subfamily Zanthoxyloideae, which is a part of the Rutaceae family. This subfamily includes various species of flowering plants, many of which are native to Australia. Classification at the species level is typically based on characteristics such as leaf morphology and fruit size.
uses: Diasperus cyrtophyllodes is a plant species that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties.
